title: Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
text: Lucid Group Stock Information and News. Stock Price and Performance. Lucid Group stock (ticker: LCID) trades on the NASDAQ exchange. The stock has experienced significant volatility, with a 52-week range reflecting the company's operational challenges and growth potential. Year-to-date performance reflects market reactions to earnings announcements, production challenges, and strategic announcements. Company News and Updates. Yahoo Finance provides comprehensive coverage of Lucid Group including latest news, earnings announcements, analyst ratings, and stock price movements. Key Events include CEO transitions, capital raises, partnership announcements, and production updates. Historical Data. The platform maintains historical stock price data, volume information, and technical indicators for comprehensive analysis of LCID stock performance. Earnings History. Multiple quarters of earnings data including revenue, net income, earnings per share, and guidance information are available for trend analysis and forecasting.
